repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc or InferShape because GetInputShape returns StorageShape* but code uses Shape* and calls GetOriginShape, do not assign to const gert::Shape* and call GetOriginShape; instead assign to const gert::StorageShape* and use its methods directly.

repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memories directly address the exact compilation error seen in ca6k_00390: 'cannot convert const gert::StorageShape* to const gert::Shape*' in TilingFunc. Memories 1 (ca6k_00333) and 2 (ca6k_00343) are from the same op category (torch#1) with identical error message. Memories 3 (argmax_over_a_dimension) and 4 (masked_cumsum) demonstrate the same conversion pattern in TilingFunc. Memory 5 (ca6k_00266) covers the broader issue of GetInputShape returning StorageShape* when Shape* is expected. These provide concrete examples of the fix: do not assign the result directly to Shape*; instead use StorageShape* or call GetOriginShape correctly.
